testsuite.name: io.github.eucsoh.integration.RealLogsIntegrationTest

testcase.name: real logs analysis pipeline runs end-to-end()
real logs folder structure is correct if it exists()

testsuite.system-out: ⊘ Skipping real logs test: no CSV files found in src/test/resources/real_logs To enable this test, add real EUC log files to this directory ⊘ Warning: real_logs folder exists but contains no CSV files
